objective: Freeze an engine-independent Decimal oracle for transforming exact provisional S6 issuer valuation results into deterministic top-N decisions, then require the version-pinned TrueAlpha Qlib adapter owned by #26 to reproduce it.
claim_ceiling: preparation-only Qlib selection-adapter oracle; this revision earns no rung and authorizes no dependency installation, runtime adapter, approved product semantics, real TOPT mapping, stable handoff, factor activation, replay, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued S7 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
the twelve-candidate corpus path and SHA-256 are committed before execution
the Qlib architecture selection is merged before adapter implementation
a later manifest revision pins the dependency lock and authorizes the Qlib adapter paths
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
an active integration lease covers the package export path
issue #181 contains the exact manifest path and SHA-256

dependencies.artifact: accepted executable Core Strategy definition contract
accepted issuer P/S and strategy candidate identity contract
accepted provisional issuer tier and valuation-gap evidence
approved strategy eligibility, ranking, tie-break, and short-book semantics
merged Qlib architecture selection and version-pinned adapter ownership

required_strata: twelve bound issuers with eleven eligible S6 results and one explicit ineligible result
descending valuation-gap ranking and configured top-ten selection
issuer-to-execution-listing mapping and selected confidence propagation
missing, duplicate, extra, unavailable, and below-minimum-confidence issuer results
insufficient eligible count and unapproved equal-gap tie failure
input reordering, ambient Decimal context, canonical partitions, and semantic identity
independent Decimal oracle parity with the pinned Qlib adapter
Decimal-to-float ordering preservation and float-collision failure
rejection of Qlib TopkDropout turnover semantics as a substitute for full-rebalance top-N

release_activation.reason: S7 is isolated provisional selection evidence; #59/#21 approval, #24 GPPE, and #25 candidate acceptance remain mandatory

negative_controls: binding, candidate-universe, P/S policy, cutoff, issuer, or execution-listing identity mismatch
missing, duplicate, extra, unavailable, or below-minimum-confidence S6 result
fewer eligible issuers than the configured selection count
equal valuation gaps without an approved tie-break rule
stale S2, S4, S6, semantic-candidate, or public-golden identity
Qlib distribution, adapter, operator-registry, strategy, or configuration identity drift
Decimal scores that collide or reverse order after the adapter's float transport conversion
Qlib turnover/dropout behavior substituted for the declared full-rebalance top-N rule
attempted supplied valuation inputs, provenance, registry, runner, or release activation

invalidation: eligibility, ranking direction, tie behavior, selection count, Qlib binding, corpus, or output identity change creates a new batch revision
dependency installation or adapter implementation requires a later revision with an exact lock and shared-path lease
shared-path need blocks the batch until an explicit integration lease exists
product approval, real TOPT mapping, GPPE implementation, or materialization does not raise this provisional evidence ceiling
rollback: Revert the isolated S7 batch paths and evidence together; no accepted factor registry, runner, or runtime release may reference this provisional selection result.
